title: Implement memory freshness and contradiction signals

execplan_profile.projection_rule: canonical_core is authoritative for intent, scope, next action, proof, continuation, and closeout; legacy fields remain compatibility projections.

canonical_core.requested_outcome: Implement #1257 by giving Memory notes explicit freshness, supersession, and contradiction metadata and projecting that status in report and route consult output.
canonical_core.hard_constraints: Keep the slice bounded to explicit manifest metadata, advisory trust projection, and focused Memory package tests. Do not implement semantic contradiction clustering or make stale notes block unrelated work.
canonical_core.agent_may_decide: Exact field names, projection wording, focused tests, and whether route consult or report output needs compact human-readable rendering.
canonical_core.escalate_when: A correct fix requires cross-agent semantic inference, automatic contradiction discovery, changing Memory note ownership, or hard-gating ordinary work on stale advisory memory.
canonical_core.next_action: Run focused tests, fix any failures, then run required Memory package validation.
completion_criteria: Manifest note records can carry last_confirmed, valid_until, superseded_by, and contradicted_by metadata.
Memory report exposes fresh, stale, superseded, and contradicted note trust as advisory findings.
Memory route consult exposes selected-note freshness/trust before an agent relies on routed notes.
Focused and package-level Memory validation pass.

goal: Implement #1257 by giving Memory notes explicit freshness, supersession, and contradiction metadata and projecting that status in report and route consult output.
non_goals: Do not implement automatic semantic contradiction clustering.

Do not broaden into adjacent command-generation or planning issues.
